km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Richard Maynard於1365年出生在英國。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1405年享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Maynard于1365年出生在英国。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1405年享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maynard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Mainard (from ancient Germanic Maganhard, Meginard, from magin- ‘power, might’ + hard- ‘brave, hardy’). Compare Mainard .
Altered form of French Ménard (see Menard ), a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Minardi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Carmine, Sal, Salvatore, Silvio, Corrado, Emanuele, Gino, Giorgio, Luciano, Natale.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of a personal name, Minardo, equivalent to Maynard .

variants.name: Minard
meanings: French: variant of Ménard (see Menard ), a cognate of Maynard .

variants.name: Minardo
meanings: Italian: from the personal name Minardo of German origin, see Maynard 1.

variants.name: Mainard
meanings: English (Hampshire and Kent) and French: variant of   Maynard  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Maino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Elida, Angelo, Mario, Rodolfo, Vito.
Italian (northern): from the ancient Germanic personal name Maino, a short form of compound names beginning with the element magin ‘strength’, such as Mainardo (see Maynard 1).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Maynard was born in 1365, in England. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1405, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Maynard est né en 1365, à Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1405, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Maynard wurde 1365 in England geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1405 im Alter von 40 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Maynard è nato il nel 1365 nel England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1405, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Maynardは1365年にイギリスで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1405年に40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Maynard(은)는 1365년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1405년 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Maynard nasceu em 1365, em Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1405, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Maynard родился в 1365 г. в местности Англия. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1405 г. в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Maynard nació en 1365, en Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1405, a la edad de 40 años.
